attributes.description: Alerts when average active connections exceed 256. Approaching `worker_connections` ceiling.
attributes.name: [Nginx OTel] High active connections

investigation_guide.blob:
## NGINX high active connections

### What fired
Average active connections exceeded 256 during the window (min 3 samples).

### Why it matters
Active connection saturation predicts dropped connections. Usually a traffic surge, slow upstream holding workers, or under-sized `worker_connections`.

### Triage
1. Inspect connection state breakdown (reading/writing/waiting).
2. Check upstream latency.

### Remediation
- Raise `worker_connections`.
- Fix slow upstream.

### Tuning
- 256 is a default-configuration threshold; tune to your `worker_connections`.
